name: Flight into Egypt
oracleText:
Chapter I - Exile up to one target creature you control. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
Chapter II - Create a 1/1 white Human Citizen creature token.
Chapter III - You gain 3 life and scry 1.
flavorText: "Arise, and take the young child and his mother, and flee into Egypt." — Matthew 2:13
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Flight into Egypt" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Flight into Egypt
classics.sourceNotes: An exact Flight into Egypt image is the right classics treatment here.
